summary: Tested all 3 new features: Typography overhaul, light background for knowledge center, and Stripe payment/admin admission flow. All 8 backend tests pass. Frontend UI testing confirmed all critical flows working.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid='filter-pending' not found (may use different testid). Visually the PENDING tab exists and works. Not blocking.
data-testid='status-badge-{id}' not found on status cells, but approval flow works correctly (status visually changes to ENROLLED after click)

issues: Note: test spec referenced wrong URL '/knowledge-center/drug-alcohol-compliance-brief' — actual route is '/knowledge-center/drug-alcohol-program-brief'

action_items: MINOR: Add data-testid='filter-pending' to pending filter tab in AdminAdmissionsPage.jsx if missing
MINOR: Add data-testid='status-badge-{id}' to status cells in admin table rows
critical_code_review_comments: Typography: Playfair Display on h1, Atkinson Hyperlegible on body p, IBM Plex Mono on LP codes — all verified via computed styles
Brief page: .content-page class correctly sets cream bg (rgb(247,244,238)) and navy h1 (rgb(0,26,51))
Article page: light body section with cream background exists below dark hero
Stripe integration: real checkout URL returned successfully
Admin approval: PATCH updates status, Enrolled count increments correctly

success_rate.frontend: 95% (minor testid naming issues, all functionality works)

seed_data_creation: Created ~6 TEST_ admission records during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features (typography, light backgrounds, Stripe+admin admission) verified working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py. Known minor issues: filter-pending data-testid may not match spec, status-badge data-testid not found on rows.
